violations.text: Produce walk-in cooler was not in good repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 49 degrees Fahrenheit. No TCS foods observed. PIC informed that no TCS foods can be stored in unit until it reaches 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
